extDesc.message: Hide distracting elements on any webpage with a stunning particle dissolution effect. Click to pick, watch it dissolve.

pickModeInactive.message: Hover over elements to hide them

pickModeActive.message: Click any element to dissolve it

pickHintInactive.message: Click the toggle to start hiding distractions

pickHintActive.message: Hover to select • Click to dissolve • Esc to stop

footerText.message: Press Esc to exit Pick Mode
